title: pipeline-watch suppression file
description: Per-project policy that silences known-good findings without passing --skip in CI.

suppression.description: A single suppression rule. Must specify at least one of 'package' or 'check_id'.

reason.description: Why this finding is being suppressed. Required — silent ignores hide context from auditors.

package.description: Package name the rule applies to. Omit to match every package.

check_id.description: SC-XXX identifier the rule applies to. Omit to match every check.

expires.description: Optional ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Past-dated rules are ignored with a warning.
